response.justification: The candidate has solid full-stack engineering experience (~14 years) but the role requires Director-level IC profile with recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products/platforms, and cloud/AI strategy leadership. The resume shows only recent, light exposure to AI-agent infrastructure with no evidence of AI products built, AI thought leadership, or strategic advisory experience at the scale this role demands.
strengths: Broad full-stack and polyglot engineering background across web, mobile, embedded
Founder experience with open-source GIS platform shows entrepreneurial drive
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, workshops, public talks
concerns: No demonstrated AI products, platforms, or recognized AI expertise
Lacks Director-level / Principal IC strategic advisory experience
Minimal cloud platform depth beyond AWS CDK at one employer
